fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the cost type.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the cost type.

fields.name: Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Combine Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies the option to allow for general ledger entries to be posted individually or as a combined posting per day or month.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: New Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want a new page to start immediately after this cost center when you print the chart of cash flow accounts.

fields.name: Blank Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you want a blank line to appear immediately after this cost center when you print the chart of cost centers. The New Page, Blank Line, and Indentation fields define the layout of the chart of cost centers.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how many spaces the text field for the cost type is indented relative to the standard margin.
The field is filled in automatically when you choose Indent Cost Types on the Actions tab.
You can enter something in the field, but the contents are replaced the next time you choose Indent Cost Types. If you want a bigger indentation, add blank spaces with the Spacebar before you enter the text.
The Indentation, New Page, and Blank Line fields define the layout of the chart of cost types.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description that applies to the cost type.

fields.name: Cost Classification
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost type by variability.

fields.name: Fixed Share
fields.tooltip: Specifies an explanation of the Cost Classification field.

fields.name: Modified Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the cost object was last modified.

fields.name: Modified By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who last modified the cost object.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval. The Balance at Date and Budget at Date fields show the balance from the starting to the ending dates of the filter.
FlowFilter fields, such as Date Filter, Cost Center Filter, and Cost Object Filter determine how much you want to include in the calculation of the contents of FlowFields.
The following table shows the rules for entering a date interval.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

15.12.2012

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

15.12.2012..15.01.2013
..15.01.2012

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

15.12.2012|16.12.2012

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


15.12.2012|01.12.2012..10.12.2012

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..14.12.2012|30.12.2012..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Cost Center Filter
fields.tooltip:
Set a filter to filter amount fields by cost center.
FlowFilters, such as cost center and cost object, restrict the balance in amount fields to show only the entries that fit the filters.

fields.name: Cost Object Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a filter to filter amount fields by cost center.
FlowFilters, such as cost center and cost object, restrict the balance in amount fields to show only the entries that fit the filters.

fields.name: Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost type balance on the last date that is included in the Date Filter field. The contents of the field are calculated by using the entries in the Amount field in the Cost Entry table.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance during the time period in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Budget Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the cost type's total budget or, if you have specified a filter in the Budget Filter field, a filtered budget. The contents of the field are calculated by using the entries in the Amount field in the Cost Budget Entry table.

fields.name: Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a list of account numbers. The entries of the account will be totaled to give a total balance. How entries are totaled depends on the value in the Account Type field.

fields.name: Budget Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a budget filter so that the values in the Budget Amount and Budget at Date fields are based on the selected budgets only.
You can enter budget names by using a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters. The following table shows the rules for how these can be combined.


Meaning


Sample Expression


Entries Included


Equal to

1

Those from Budget 1. The budget name could contain letters instead of just numbers.


Interval

1.. 5

Those from Budgets 1 through 5.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance of the cost type.

fields.name: Budget at Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the budgeted amount up to and including the last date of the filter defined in the Date Filter field.
If the filter field contains more than one date, only the last one has any effect on the contents of this field. An interval is an example of more than one date.
The contents of the field are calculated by using the Amount field in the Cost Budget Entry table.
You can filter this field so that its contents are based only on certain cost centers and cost objects.

fields.name: G/L Account Range
fields.tooltip: Specifies a general ledger account range to establish which general ledger account a cost type belongs to.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Balance to Allocate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount that can still be allocated. The entry in the Allocated field in the Cost Entry table determines whether a cost entry is a part of this field.

fields.name: Budget Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the budgeted debit amount for the cost type.

fields.name: Budget Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the budgeted credit for the cost type.

fields.name: Add. Currency Net Change
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the net change in additional reporting currency for cost accounting reports.
If you have set up Additional Reporting Currency in the General Ledger Setup window, the amount is transferred from the general ledger entry to the cost journal entry.
The field shows the net change in additional reporting currency for the Cost Types Details report.

fields.name: Add. Currency Balance at Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the balance at date in additional reporting currency for cost accounting reports.
If you have set up Additional Reporting Currency in the General Ledger Setup window, the amount is transferred from the general ledger entry to the cost journal entry.
The field shows the balance at date in additional reporting currency for the Cost Types Details report.
